turns.thought: The swarm has completely collapsed with zero diversity and no velocity. All particles are at essentially the same point with identical fitness. This is a textbook case of premature convergence after 200 iterations without improvement. To escape this local basin, we need a drastic diversity injection by reinitializing all particles randomly within the search space. Reset_worst_particles with ratio=1.0 will effectively restart the swarm while preserving the global best (though it won't help since all are the same). Setting inertia_weight to 1.1 encourages exploration after the reset.
turns.observation: Action 'reset_worst_particles' was applied. Reinitialized 29 weak particles to restore diversity. Best cost changed from 1.083280e+02 to 1.083280e+02 (delta=+0.000000e+00).
